oneOf.description: Optional failure-domain policy. Absence preserves legacy aggregate placement.

selectedFailureDomains.description: Concrete provider domains selected during setup. Empty means the legacy aggregate mode.

spread.description: Number of distinct failure domains across which new stateful replicas may be spread.

machine.description: Provider machine type selected for this deployment.

description: User-selected deployment settings for one compute pool.
